name: Memphis Gold and Diamond Buyers
description_short: Memphis Gold and Diamond Buyers purchases jewelry, coins, bullion, and precious metals for cash with same-day payment. Founded in 2010, they operate in the Memphis area with transparent on-site valuation.
description_long:
Memphis Gold and Diamond Buyers was established in 2010 to provide a safe, comfortable environment for selling precious metals and jewelry in the Memphis area. The company positions itself as a transparent buyer of gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, coins, and bullion, with a storefront designed to resemble a cozy living room rather than a traditional pawn shop. They claim to pay competitive market rates and emphasize customer service and expertise.

The company offers immediate cash or check payment for precious metals and jewelry, with valuations typically completed in 5-10 minutes without requiring appointments. They buy broken jewelry in multiple karats (10k through 24k gold), sterling and pure silver, silverware, platinum, loose diamonds, diamond jewelry, estate jewelry, fine watches, and coins/bullion. All testing and valuation occurs in front of the customer using certified, state-of-the-art equipment. Staff are trained in diamond grading, coin/bullion evaluation, and precious metal recycling.

Memphis Gold and Diamond Buyers differentiates itself through speed (claiming cash in under 10 minutes), staff expertise, transparent evaluation processes where items never leave customer sight, and relationships with top refineries and wholesalers worldwide. The company has developed a strong Google review profile with customer testimonials praising fair pricing, professional staff (particularly an employee named Alex), and prices that allegedly exceed competitors in a multi-state region.

As a precious metals buyer, this company operates within the pawn-shop category but functions primarily as a specialized metals and jewelry purchaser rather than a general collateral lender. Customers should note that selling jewelry yields lower prices than market value due to the buyer's profit margin, and prices fluctuate with commodity markets. The business operates Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm, closed Sundays, serving the greater Memphis area.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast turnaround: valuations completed in 5-10 minutes with same-day cash or check payment
Transparent process: customers observe entire testing and valuation with items never leaving their sight
No appointment required and rarely any wait time according to website claims
Trained staff in diamond grading, precious metal evaluation, and coin/bullion assessment
Uses certified, state-of-the-art equipment for evaluations
Free, no-obligation estimates provided before any transaction
Wide range of items accepted: all gold karats, silver, platinum, diamonds, watches, coins, bullion, and estate jewelry
Strong customer reviews on Google with multiple testimonials citing fair pricing and knowledgeable staff
cons: Operates only Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm, closed Sundays, limiting accessibility for some customers
Serves primarily the Memphis area; geographic reach appears limited to local region
Selling jewelry yields significantly below market value (inherent to precious metals buyers)
Precious metals prices fluctuate daily; customer may receive different offers on different dates
No information provided about buyback guarantees, price matching, or recourse if customer is dissatisfied
best_for: People with broken, unwanted, or estate jewelry seeking immediate cash without appointments
Coin and bullion collectors wanting to sell holdings to a knowledgeable buyer
Memphis-area residents needing quick cash from precious metals without lengthy haggling
diagnosis: Memphis Gold and Diamond Buyers is best for Memphis-area residents who need fast cash for precious metals, jewelry, or coins and value transparent, expert evaluation. The main caveat is that selling to any precious metals buyer yields below-market prices due to the buyer's margin, and prices fluctuate with daily commodity rates—customers should compare offers from multiple buyers and understand they will not receive full market value.
services: In-person jewelry/metals evaluation with certified equipment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
